name: Sourdough Mexican Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, salt, chili powder, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the sourdough starter, milk, beaten egg, cream-style corn, cooking oil or shortening, grated Cheddar cheese, green chiles, pimiento, and bacon.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
4. Fill greased muffin pans 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Makes 12 muffins.
